## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Docker Dash version: (e.g., v3.10.2)
- Browser: (e.g., Chrome 120)
- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04)
- Docker version: (e.g., 27.0)
- Multi-host: yes/no
